question: Using the 2017-2022 year with the lowest RGRTA ridership, form the school-year window from three years before through one year after. Among Texas counties that are top five by average home-based daycare sites in that window, what is the highest average site count, rounded to the nearest integer? Report only the rounded number in `Number` format. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Summing Ridership across all subsidiaries by Year for 2017-2022, the minimum total is 7778388 in 2021.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2022 has the lowest total ridership reported by the Rochester Genesee Regional Transportation Authority? (Sum Ridership by Year across all subsidiaries and select the minimum.)

2.fact: In the 2018-2019 program year (<node_1 answer> - 3), counts by CECounty show 16 Texas counties with CACFP day care homes. The top 5 were: HARRIS (1342), TRAVIS (1287), TAYLOR (691), TARRANT (336), HIDALGO (307).
2.subquestion: How many CACFP day care homes were in each Texas county in <node_1 answer> - 3 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 3>-<node_1 answer - 2 (two digits)>'; count sites by CECounty.)

3.fact: In the 2019-2020 program year (<node_1 answer> - 2), counts by CECounty show 17 Texas counties with CACFP day care homes. The top 5 were: TRAVIS (1236), HARRIS (1174), TAYLOR (647), HIDALGO (271), TARRANT (266).
3.subquestion: How many CACFP day care homes were in each Texas county in <node_1 answer> - 2 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 2>-<node_1 answer - 1 (two digits)>'; count sites by CECounty.)

4.fact: In the 2020-2021 program year (<node_1 answer> - 1), counts by CECounty show 15 Texas counties with CACFP day care homes. The top 5 were: TRAVIS (1175), HARRIS (1046), TAYLOR (643), HIDALGO (252), DALLAS (239).
4.subquestion: How many CACFP day care homes were in each Texas county in <node_1 answer> - 1 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 1>-<node_1 answer (two digits)>'; count sites by CECounty.)

5.fact: In the 2021-2022 program year (<node_1 answer>), counts by CECounty show 15 Texas counties with CACFP day care homes. The top 5 were: TRAVIS (1139), HARRIS (759), TAYLOR (726), FORT BEND (359), HIDALGO (225).
5.subquestion: How many CACFP day care homes were in each Texas county in <node_1 answer> school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer>-<node_1 answer + 1 (two digits)>'; count sites by CECounty.)

6.fact: In the 2022-2023 program year (<node_1 answer> + 1), counts by CECounty show 11 Texas counties with CACFP day care homes. The top 5 were: TRAVIS (1214), TAYLOR (807), HARRIS (523), TARRANT (272), DALLAS (255).
6.subquestion: How many CACFP day care homes were in each Texas county in <node_1 answer> + 1 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer + 1>-<node_1 answer + 2 (two digits)>'; count sites by CECounty.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Year with lowest RGRTA ridership (2017-2022) -> 2021
Derived school year range: 2018-2019 through 2022-2023 (node_1 answer - 3 to node_1 answer + 1 school years)
Node 2: CACFP day care homes 2018-2019 (<node_1> - 3) -> top 5 counties by CECounty count
